title: Virtual Creator Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Virtual Creator Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 high-precision 3D CG anime-realistic cyber virtual-idol portrait for an adult East Asian female virtual creator, 24 years old, teal-to-silver long hair, bright confident eyes, built around white cropped tech jacket, black glossy shorts, chrome mini crossbody bag, round metallic sunglasses on head, thigh-up near-camera interactive portrait with direct gentle gaze, shy smile, and approachable romantic posture, and rainy neon Tokyo-style street with pink, blue, violet, and cyan signs blurred into bokeh. Subject: an adult East Asian female virtual creator, 24 years old, teal-to-silver long hair, bright confident eyes is the adult stylized hero character, rendered with refined anime-realistic facial structure, bright glassy eyes, lively expression, detailed hair strands, and virtual idol polish. Scene: rainy neon Tokyo-style street with pink, blue, violet, and cyan signs blurred into bokeh supplies the cyber-night street context with wet reflective ground, neon signage, city depth, bokeh, air particles, and soft volumetric glow. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 half-body-to-thigh portrait composition: the character leans close to the camera, face and upper body dominate, hands remain readable, shoulder turn is lively, and background depth stays blurred but richly layered. Signature Elements: Cyber-cute virtual idol expression, neon street bokeh, wet reflective ground, glossy techwear, small playful accessories, V-sign or close social-photo pose, and clean 3D CG finish rather than flat illustration. Style: High-fidelity anime-style 3D CG character art, semi-realistic virtual idol portrait, polished character modeling, PBR materials, Octane render style, Unreal Engine cinematic lighting, glossy fabric shaders, realistic hair strands, subsurface scattering skin, and premium cyber-street portrait finish. Color Palette: Fixed cyber palette led by teal or mint hair accents, white and black outfit contrast, glossy dark materials, pink-purple neon, electric blue, fluorescent cyan, and clean bright highlights that never overexpose the face. Lighting: Strong neon backlight combined with soft frontal fill, pink-blue rim light on hair edges, clear eye highlights, glossy jacket and leather reflections, gentle bloom, and luminous rainy-night atmosphere. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: PBR skin, glossy coated fabric, reflective leather or metal accessories, transparent dark lenses, realistic hair strand separation, wet pavement reflections, and crisp zipper, pocket, stitch, and bag hardware details. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
